requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Grid Basis and Site-Specific Interconnection

summary.en: Bangladesh and China both operate on a 50 Hz power-system basis, which helps PCS and transformer screening, but grid interconnection still depends on the Bangladesh point of connection. Utility review can require protection settings, voltage and frequency operating windows, anti-islanding, fault ride-through, harmonics, grounding, SCADA, metering, communications, commissioning tests, and site acceptance.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国和中国均以50Hz电力系统为基础，这有助于PCS和变压器筛查，但并网仍取决于孟加拉国接入点。电网审查可能要求保护整定、电压和频率运行窗口、防孤岛、故障穿越、谐波、接地、SCADA、计量、通信、调试测试和现场验收。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國和中國均以50Hz電力系統為基礎，這有助於PCS和變壓器篩查，但併網仍取決於孟加拉國接入點。電網審查可能要求保護整定、電壓和頻率運行窗口、防孤島、故障穿越、諧波、接地、SCADA、計量、通信、調試測試和現場驗收。

standards_or_laws: Project-specific protection, power-quality, and metering studies

summary.en: GB/T 36558-2023 system evidence and China 50 Hz design settings may support engineering review, but they are not Bangladesh utility approval. PCS firmware, transformer taps, relay settings, harmonic limits, grounding, HVAC derating, and SCADA should be validated for the Bangladesh site.
summary.zh: GB/T 36558-2023系统证据和中国50Hz设计整定可支持工程审查，但不是孟加拉国电网批准。应针对孟加拉国场址验证PCS固件、变压器分接、继电保护整定、谐波限值、接地、暖通降额和SCADA。
summary.zht: GB/T 36558-2023系統證據和中國50Hz設計整定可支持工程審查，但不是孟加拉國電網批准。應針對孟加拉國場址驗證PCS韌體、變壓器分接、繼電保護整定、諧波限值、接地、暖通降額和SCADA。

gap.en: Produce Bangladesh-specific relay settings, grid model, power-quality study, short-circuit study, SCADA protocol, commissioning plan, and site acceptance records instead of relying only on China factory settings.
gap.zh: 应制作孟加拉国特定继电保护整定、电网模型、电能质量研究、短路研究、SCADA协议、调试计划和现场验收记录，而不是仅依赖中国出厂整定。
gap.zht: 應製作孟加拉國特定繼電保護整定、電網模型、電能品質研究、短路研究、SCADA協議、調試計劃和現場驗收記錄，而不是僅依賴中國出廠整定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected BESS where utility interconnection, grid-code, EPC, owner, insurer, or commissioning approval applies; details are project and connection-point specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or contract-specific for China grid-connected projects through grid-company technical review, connection agreement, and commissioning acceptance

source.publisher: Power Division, Ministry of Power, Energy and Mineral Resources, Government of Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The 50 Hz match is helpful engineering context, not an interconnection approval. Bangladesh site settings and utility commissioning remain separate requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 50Hz一致是有帮助的工程背景，不是并网批准。孟加拉国场址整定和电网公司调试仍是单独要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 50Hz一致是有幫助的工程背景，不是併網批准。孟加拉國場址整定和電網公司調試仍是單獨要求。
